revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:March 20 (lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of March 20 (lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦3月20日'''は[[旧暦]][[3月 (旧暦)|3月]]の20日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[仁安]]3年（[[1168年]]_月_日） - 憲仁親王が即位して第80代・[[高倉天皇]]に * [[正和]]元年（[[1312年]]_月_日） - 正和に改元
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[慶長]]9年（[[1604年]]_月_日） - [[黒田孝高]]（如水・官兵衛）、[[武将]]・キリシタン大名（* [[1546年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[3月19日 (旧暦)|3月19日]] 翌日[[3月21日 (旧暦)|3月21日]] - 前月[[2月20日 (旧暦)|2月20日]] 翌月[[4月20日 (旧暦)|4月20日]] *新暦[[3月20日]]
{{msg:stub}}

revision.comment: 日付換算・テンプレ差し替え。[[高倉天皇]]の即位日が不明のためコメントアウト

{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月20日'''は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の20日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == <!--* [[仁安]]3年（[[1168年]]_月_日） - 憲仁親王が即位して第80代・[[高倉天皇]]に--> * [[正和]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1312年]][[4月27日]]） - [[応長]]より正和に[[改元]]
== 誕生日 == * [[天保]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1834年]][[4月28日]]） - [[前原一誠]]、[[長州藩]]士（+ [[1876年]]） * 明治元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[4月12日]]） - [[秋山真之]]、[[海軍軍人]]（+ [[1918年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[永承]]6年（[[1326年]][[4月23日]]） - [[邦良親王]]、[[後二条天皇]]第一皇子、[[木寺宮家]]の祖（* [[1300年]]） * [[慶長]]9年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1604年]][[4月19日]]） - [[黒田孝高]]（如水・官兵衛）、[[武将]]・[[キリシタン大名]]（* [[1546年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|19|3|21|2|20|4|3|0320}}
[[Category:untranslated pages]][[ja:3月20日 (旧暦)]][[Category:new pages]]

== できごと == <!--* [[仁安]]3年（[[1168年]]_月_日） - 憲仁親王が即位して第80代・[[高倉天皇]]に--> * [[正和]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1312年]][[4月27日]]） - [[応長]]より正和に[[改元]]
== 誕生日 == * [[天保]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1834年]][[4月28日]]） - [[前原一誠]]、[[長州藩]]士（+ [[1876年]]） * 明治元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[4月12日]]） - [[秋山真之]]、[[海軍軍人]]（+ [[1918年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[永承]]6年（[[1326年]][[4月23日]]） - [[邦良親王]]、[[後二条天皇]]第一皇子、[[木寺宮家]]の祖（* [[1300年]]） * [[慶長]]9年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1604年]][[4月19日]]） - [[黒田孝高]]（如水・官兵衛）、[[武将]]・[[キリシタン大名]]（* [[1546年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|19|3|21|2|20|4|3|0320}}

revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:仏滅]] to [[Category:Butsumetsu]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "旧暦360日" to "Old Lunar Calendar360日"
Text replacement - "Old Lunar Calendar360日" to "Lunar Calendar See Also"
Text replacement - " (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the" to "''' is the"
I think this is the glitch source
attempting again to remove the lunar calendar days comments that are causing problems
removing the annoying spaces that make editing harder
putting this here so I can replace it to insert all necessary interlanguage links into it
doing a mass replace to get the proper intweriki links for all the dates
Copying from [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
switching this to a specialized system of tracing completion
switching this to a specialized system of tracing completion
Removing from [[Category:New pages most likely u]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
adding korean to all the dates
Text replacement - "[[ユリウス暦]]" to "[[Julian Calendar]]"
Text replacement - "[[グレゴリオ暦]]" to "[[Gregorian Calendar]]"
removing some junk and restandardizing the references section and template
revision.text:
[[sn:March 20 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 20일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月20日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 20일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿]] [[zh:三月廿]] [[en:draft:March 20 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
== Events ==
* [[正和]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1312]][[4月27日]]） - [[応長]]より正和に[[改元]]
== Births == * [[天保]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1834]][[4月28日]]） - [[前原一誠]]、[[長州藩]]士（+ [[1876]]） * 明治1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1868]][[4月12日]]） - [[秋山真之]]、[[海軍軍人]]（+ [[1918]]）
== Deaths == * [[永承]]6年（[[1326]][[4月23日]]） - [[邦良親王]]、[[後二条天皇]]第一皇子、[[木寺宮家]]の祖（* [[1300]]） * [[慶長]]9年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1604]][[4月19日]]） - [[黒田孝高]]（如水・官兵衛）、[[武将]]・[[キリシタン大名]]（* [[1546]]）

revision.text:
[[sn:March 20 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 20일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月20日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 20일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿]] [[zh:三月廿]] [[en:draft:March 20 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
== Events ==
* [[正和]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1312]][[4月27日]]） - [[応長]]より正和に[[改元]]
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}5th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1834]][[4月28日]]） - [[前原一誠]]、[[長州藩]]士（+ [[1876]]） * 明治1st year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1868]][[4月12日]]） - [[秋山真之]]、[[海軍軍人]]（+ [[1918]]）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Eishō|ja|永承}}6th year（[[1326]][[4月23日]]） - [[邦良親王]]、[[後二条天皇]]第一皇子、[[木寺宮家]]の祖（* [[1300]]） * [[Keichō]]9th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1604]][[4月19日]]） - [[黒田孝高]]（如水・官兵衛）、[[武将]]・[[キリシタン大名]]（* [[1546]]）
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|19|3|21|2|20|4|3|0320}}

revision.text:
[[sn:March 20 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 20일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月20日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 20일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿]] [[zh:三月廿]] [[en:draft:March 20 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events ==
* [[正和]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1312]] [[April 27]] ） - [[応長]] より正和に[[改元]]
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1834]] [[April 28]] ） - [[前原一誠]] 、[[長州藩]] 士（+ [[1876]] ） * 明治1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 12]] ） - [[秋山真之]] 、[[海軍軍人]] （+ [[1918]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Eishō|ja|永承}} 6th year（[[1326]] [[April 23]] ） - [[邦良親王]] 、[[後二条天皇]] 第一皇子、[[木寺宮家]] の祖（* [[1300]] ） * [[Keichō]] 9th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1604]] [[April 19]] ） - [[黒田孝高]] （如水・官兵衛）、[[武将]] ・[[キリシタン大名]] （* [[1546]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|19|3|21|2|20|4|3|0320}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events ==
* [[正和]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1312]] [[April 27]] ） - [[応長]] より正和に[[改元]]
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1834]] [[April 28]] ） - [[前原一誠]] 、[[Chōshū Domain]] 士（+ [[1876]] ） * 明治1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 12]] ） - [[秋山真之]] 、[[海軍Military Personnel]] （+ [[1918]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Eishō|ja|永承}} 6th year（[[1326]] [[April 23]] ） - [[邦良親王]] 、[[後二条天皇]] 第一皇子、[[木寺宮家]] の祖（* [[1300]] ） * [[Keichō]] 9th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1604]] [[April 19]] ） - [[黒田孝高]] （如水・官兵衛）、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[Christian Daimyō]] （* [[1546]] ）== See Also ==

* [[正和]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1312]] [[April 27]] ） - [[応長]] より正和に[[改元]]
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1834]] [[April 28]] ） - [[前原一誠]] 、[[Chōshū Domain]] 士（+ [[1876]] ） * 明治1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 12]] ） - [[秋山真之]] 、[[海軍Military Personnel]] （+ [[1918]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Eishō|ja|永承}} 6th year（[[1326]] [[April 23]] ） - [[邦良親王]] 、[[後二条天皇]] 第一皇子、[[木寺宮家]] の祖（* [[1300]] ） * [[Keichō]] 9th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1604]] [[April 19]] ） - [[黒田孝高]] （如水・官兵衛）、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} ・[[Christian Daimyō]] （* [[1546]] ）

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft}} .

== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1834]] [[April 28]] ） - [[前原一誠]] 、[[Chōshū Domain]] 士（+ [[1876]] ） * 明治1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[April 12]] ） - [[秋山真之]] 、[[海軍Military Personnel]] （+ [[1918]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Eishō|ja|永承|12=draft}} 6th year（[[1326]] [[April 23]] ） - [[邦良親王]] 、[[後二条天皇]] 第一皇子、[[木寺宮家]] の祖（* [[1300]] ） * [[Keichō]] 9th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1604]] [[April 19]] ） - [[黒田孝高]] （如水・官兵衛）、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将|12=draft}} ・[[Christian Daimyō]] （* [[1546]] ）

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月20日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 20일]][[zh_min_nan:3 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月二十]][[zh:三月二十]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839228]] Wikidata name: 20th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:00, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 20|qq=March 20}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月二十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 20일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 20''' is the 20th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Shōwa (1312–1317)|Shōwa]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1312|1312]] [[:en:April 27|April 27]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] to [[:en:Shōwa (1312–1317)|Shōwa]]. == Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]]) – {{ill|Maehara Issei|ja|前原一誠|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maehara Issei|qq=|1=Maebara Issei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11397057}}, a member of the [[:en:Chōshū Domain|長州藩]] (died [[:en:1876|1876]]). * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – [[:en:Akiyama Saneyuki|Akiyama Masayuki]], a naval military personnel (died [[:en:1918|1918]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Eishō (Heian period)|Eishō]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1326|1326]] [[:en:April 23|April 23]]) – {{ill|Kuniyoshi Shinnō|ja|邦良親王|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuniyoshi Shinnō|qq=|1=Kuniyoshi-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11643008}}, the first prince of [[:en:Emperor Go-Nijō|Go-Nijō Tennō]] and the progenitor of the {{ill|Kidera-no-miya|ja|木寺宮家|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kidera-no-miya|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 木寺宮|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 木寺宮|1=Kidera-no-miya|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11518293}} (born [[:en:1300|1300]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1604|1604]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – [[:en:Kuroda Yoshitaka|Kuroda Takakazu]], also known as 【Nyosui】 and 【Kanbei】, a military commander and Christian daimyō (born [[:en:1546|1546]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|19|3|21|2|20|4|3|0320|qq=}}

== Events == * [[:en:Shōwa (1312–1317)|Shōwa]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1312|1312]] [[:en:April 27|April 27]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] to [[:en:Shōwa (1312–1317)|Shōwa]]. == Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]]) – {{ill|Maehara Issei|ja|前原一誠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maehara Issei|1=Maebara Issei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11397057}}, a member of the [[:en:Chōshū Domain|長州藩]] (died [[:en:1876|1876]]). * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – [[:en:Akiyama Saneyuki|Akiyama Masayuki]], a naval military personnel (died [[:en:1918|1918]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Eishō (Heian period)|Eishō]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1326|1326]] [[:en:April 23|April 23]]) – {{ill|Kuniyoshi Shinnō|ja|邦良親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuniyoshi Shinnō|1=Kuniyoshi-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11643008}}, the first prince of [[:en:Emperor Go-Nijō|Go-Nijō Tennō]] and the progenitor of the {{ill|Kidera-no-miya|ja|木寺宮家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kidera-no-miya|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 木寺宮|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 木寺宮|1=Kidera-no-miya|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11518293}} (born [[:en:1300|1300]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1604|1604]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – [[:en:Kuroda Yoshitaka|Kuroda Takakazu]], also known as 【Nyosui】 and 【Kanbei】, a military commander and Christian daimyō (born [[:en:1546|1546]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|19|3|21|2|20|4|3|0320|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月20日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 20일]][[zh_min_nan:3 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月二十]][[zh:三月二十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月20日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 20일]][[zh_min_nan:3 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月二十]][[zh:三月二十]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月20日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 20일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月二十]][[zh:三月二十]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839228]] Wikidata name: 20th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:00, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 20|qq=March 20}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月二十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 20일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 20''' is the 20th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Shōwa (1312–1317)|Shōwa]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1312|1312]] [[:en:April 27|April 27]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] to [[:en:Shōwa (1312–1317)|Shōwa]]. == Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]]) – {{ill|Maehara Issei|ja|前原一誠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maehara Issei|1=Maebara Issei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11397057}}, a member of the [[:en:Chōshū Domain|長州藩]] (died [[:en:1876|1876]]). * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:April 12|April 12]]) – [[:en:Akiyama Saneyuki|Akiyama Masayuki]], a naval military personnel (died [[:en:1918|1918]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Eishō (Heian period)|Eishō]] 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1326|1326]] [[:en:April 23|April 23]]) – {{ill|Kuniyoshi Shinnō|ja|邦良親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuniyoshi Shinnō|1=Kuniyoshi-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11643008}}, the first prince of [[:en:Emperor Go-Nijō|Go-Nijō Tennō]] and the progenitor of the {{ill|Kidera-no-miya|ja|木寺宮家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kidera-no-miya|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 木寺宮|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 木寺宮|1=Kidera-no-miya|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11518293}} (born [[:en:1300|1300]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1604|1604]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – [[:en:Kuroda Yoshitaka|Kuroda Takakazu]], also known as 【Nyosui】 and 【Kanbei】, a military commander and Christian daimyō (born [[:en:1546|1546]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|19|3|21|2|20|4|3|0320|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{Not to be confused with|March 20|qq=March 20}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月二十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 20일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 20''' is the 20th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Shōwa (1312–1317)|en|Shōwa (1312–1317)|WD=Q1324807|lt=Shōwa}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1312|en|1312|WD=Q5734|lt=1312}} {{ill|April 27|en|April 27|WD=Q2533|lt=April 27}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Ōchō|en|Ōchō|WD=Q1327136|lt=Ōchō}} to {{ill|Shōwa (1312–1317)|en|Shōwa (1312–1317)|WD=Q1324807|lt=Shōwa}}. == Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1834|en|1834|WD=Q7591|lt=1834}} {{ill|April 28|en|April 28|WD=Q2534|lt=April 28}}) – {{ill|Maehara Issei|ja|前原一誠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maehara Issei|1=Maebara Issei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11397057}}, a member of the {{ill|Chōshū Domain|en|Chōshū Domain|WD=Q876267|lt=長州藩}} (died {{ill|1876|en|1876|WD=Q7766|lt=1876}}). * {{ill|Meiji Gannen|ja|明治元年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji Gannen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7717}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|April 12|en|April 12|WD=Q2499|lt=April 12}}) – {{ill|Akiyama Saneyuki|en|Akiyama Saneyuki|WD=Q709211|lt=Akiyama Masayuki}}, a naval military personnel (died {{ill|1918|en|1918|WD=Q2094|lt=1918}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Eishō (Heian period)|en|Eishō (Heian period)|WD=Q1193549|lt=Eishō}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1326|en|1326|WD=Q5782|lt=1326}} {{ill|April 23|en|April 23|WD=Q2527|lt=April 23}}) – {{ill|Kuniyoshi Shinnō|ja|邦良親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuniyoshi Shinnō|1=Kuniyoshi-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11643008}}, the first prince of {{ill|Emperor Go-Nijō|en|Emperor Go-Nijō|WD=Q374075|lt=Go-Nijō Tennō}} and the progenitor of the {{ill|Kidera-no-miya|ja|木寺宮家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kidera-no-miya|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 木寺宮|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 木寺宮|1=Kidera-no-miya|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11518293}} (born {{ill|1300|en|1300|WD=Q5609|lt=1300}}). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1604|en|1604|WD=Q6738|lt=1604}} {{ill|April 19|en|April 19|WD=Q2523|lt=April 19}}) – {{ill|Kuroda Yoshitaka|en|Kuroda Yoshitaka|WD=Q907019|lt=Kuroda Takakazu}}, also known as 【Nyosui】 and 【Kanbei】, a military commander and Christian daimyō (born {{ill|1546|en|1546|WD=Q6533|lt=1546}}).
